entities.name: Gmail

relationships.context: V uses the MeetingProcessor for managing meetings
MeetingProcessor searches Gmail for email context
MeetingProcessor fetches events via the API integrator
MeetingProcessor creates or updates profiles through the profile manager
MeetingProcessor tracks processing state with the state manager
